---
subject: "Best non-fiction books of 2025"
from: "Marginal REVOLUTION <donotreply@wordpress.com>"
to: ""
date: 2025-11-22 05:56:39
labels: ["CATEGORY_PERSONAL", "INBOX", "Tyler Cowen", "UNREAD"]
label_ids: ["CATEGORY_PERSONAL", "INBOX", "Label_2466199532210586699", "UNREAD"]
---
The year started off slow, but it ended up being a normally strong time for quality, readable non-fiction. Here is my list, noting that the links lead either to my reviews or to Amazon. These are roughly in the order I read them, not ranked ordinally. Here goes:
Caroline Burt and Richard Partington, [Arise, England: Six Kings and the Making of the English State](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=8c1e9e384cf3f478cd4596fbaea3680f5c111ef339c950e6d8191750eab90c20&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=22f145af154ed74acaa1edb39e415b72&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Tirthankar Roy and K. Ravi Raman, [Kerala: 1956 to the Present](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d354b7886240b7e110dd5965582decd4be49cc9ac96e972f810df631beda1f06&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=222443a7fc2b04c39bd7af1225545f5f&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Agnes Callard, [Open Socrates: The Case for a Philosophical Life](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=99e8403a778c93b1778ff9f6d1e5c51dc43d1a4a7d3adfd6f1c7c96ea2cbdb89&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f035124c3eb0b8376f374e33ae28f162&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Amy Sall, [The African Gaze: Photography, Cinema, and Power](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1751f51b41c450488b7af4c02c53053a8908b638c0b33f19d69882804395e6bd&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=3cfc09956552f1a6abdc0d53572fdbfb&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzAxL3RoZS1hZnJpY2FuLWdhemUtcGhvdG9ncmFwaHktY2luZW1hLWFuZC1wb3dlci5odG1s&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Michael Krielaars, [The Sound of Utopia: Musicians in the Time of Stalin](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=62178fa7b60e82e2d6f06522565d238ec008ec3d5bd136e10eeac6e850c87a61&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=d3cb752bdc269076fd0b531f7c42078e&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
David Eltis, [Rethinking the Atlantic Slave Trades](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3cb036e03f771cf4480b7b16fadef3f9a20bdf22300a641f88ba6d2f9261de9c&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=d2d37b32edd1006926dd0be9845590f8&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Philip Freeman, [In the Brewing Luminous: The Life and Music of Cecil Taylor](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e38154a59ef17bed9521532832f68756913c64b2d78c8152402aa4088384534a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=e4bc600348787dfdb9776f0cc381c37d&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Daniel Dain, [A History of Boston.](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=abb127e1cfe7027664f16f62d295ce991c575f5f4addd95e232ef6e6e6a5faa6&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=c1044cbe3d3db7e98bb61c847a51a6af&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6) Short review [here](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1ce958f4d67b4053d2b10801004739e88c20aac865c767ef9e1b3ade31649f96&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f10c8f0e1dc027d1d6a56603850b3129&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzAzL3doYXQtaXZlLWJlZW4tcmVhZGluZy0yNjcuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Ezra Klein and Derek Thompson, [Abundance](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f9ce5d97f48039ddd136f5d0497cfaec272fa3cb01a6a03a3bf1d8f69e1daa0b&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=23ff8f57bb3ddfea20ff826c00e70d7e&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzAxL2FidW5kYW5jZS1ieS1lenJhLWtsZWluLWFuZC1kZXJlay10aG9tcHNvbi5odG1s&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Ian Leslie, [John & Paul: A Love Story in Songs](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=1c5c9a22182215dbfcd809d48ecb46af71daff391be602270a62d3b1417812ff&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=e149c659502d62181eddbd44468a7e2c&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9jb252ZXJzYXRpb25zd2l0aHR5bGVyLmNvbS9lcGlzb2Rlcy9pYW4tbGVzbGllLw=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Benjamin E. Park, [American Zion: A New History of Mormonism](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=fdbb44ab59b172d4cbb3ec411af530a45e47941eaf4f2c67cb948e26e256cdc9&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=c593de0a1ada3676325b32d681d71b88&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6)
Roger Chickering, [The German Empire, 1871-1918](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4fad7c525009730895ad1d7ab0952b3299178eb6c499e743012fb523c931df7d&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=38df0166474ad69eca83cd85499633b0&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA0L3RoZS1nZXJtYW4tZW1waXJlLTE4NzEtMTkxOC5odG1s&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Donald S. Lopez Jr., [Buddhism: A Journey Through History](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=89f6c7868f4065f54cdb2de35281395f9e6d429752bc0fbce5b31ff69d5e2c7a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=f87dbb280accc6744c1192c64e18faf3&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA1L2hhcy1idWRkaGlzbS1iZWVuLXN0YXRpc3QtZm9yLWEtbG9uZy10aW1lLmh0bWw&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Dan Wang, [Breakneck: China's Quest to Engineer the Future](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=66a1b4f4b263568b36a89b72d3b0b13ba567dc4fe937c60380c10eb0e91a969d&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=0998f10b0040c995da91aebbf3e57988&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Keach Hagey, [The Optimist: Sam Altman, OpenAI, and the Race to Invent the Future](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=91156b30d2b2173ebd3ac614f066ef3ba767473568000a187e0a03709b9bb69f&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=243cbeec470b6638823dfc9a05d1cbbd&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Joseph Torigian, [The Party's Interests Come First: The Life of Xi Zhongxun, Father of Xi Jinping](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f88d3cddb9ef46168f2d361ed9d45316cea5d1be198e8b52cba05e3edf64390d&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=ebe64a7564a28a97895c927b3f06bae6&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA2L3RoZS1wYXJ0eXMtaW50ZXJlc3RzLWNvbWUtZmlyc3QuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Rupert Gavin, [Amorous or Loving?: The Highly Peculiar Tale of English and the English](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=35cb49407a336d93f6660cb7495a71da15652b4dd476f5a348e03fba7b3ab2f6&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=ccc5a9d96ce8fdd02338fdf9eb013221&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA2L3doYXQtaXZlLWJlZW4tcmVhZGluZy0yNzIuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Sam Tanenhaus, [Buckley: The Life and Revolution that Changed America](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6a9ed825ae223c93ab55f76c0a6be47ae22124514022a9535dca52b9e19a64cb&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=c38a85ed2fedc181e1e9cd7340b71e85&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA3L2J1Y2tsZXktdGhlLWxpZmUtYW5kLXJldm9sdXRpb24tdGhhdC1jaGFuZ2VkLWFtZXJpY2EuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Erik Penman, [Eric Satie Three Piece Suite](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=684266f9fb7256a698f515e2435f655859636e71edac4d090f38c8c0ef3bd19a&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=4b334536cbdb17605a05e3839156153f&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA4L3doYXQtaXZlLWJlZW4tcmVhZGluZy0yNzQuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Dwarkesh Patel, and others, [The Scaling Era: An Oral History of AI, 2019-2025](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e9845e387c6a56c093250c5e0d77d852dc0b16ca3fb037ccc564749b6186beaa&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=0d445d3f5c58a6c7f3edeaca2bec4765&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Jeff McMahan, editor, [Derek Parfit: His Life and Thought](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6d674d9c9d13a85a78ff905094fe06eb7b0a5646e46d2b5d36500cd3fbfdc6f8&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=3ff52ea54efabe50ad1d226e25fa678f&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzA5L25ldy1kZXJlay1wYXJmaXQtdm9sdW1lLmh0bWw&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Paul McCartney, [Wings: The Story of a Band on the Run](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ffa35008e63407a15633d5bc9da81a3d175d29e188414df3ebaa4b99c29f3da0&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=af165e811c2184ee747d01adfb4d68d9&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzExL3doYXQtaXZlLWJlZW4tcmVhZGluZy0yNzkuaHRtbA=&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
William Easterly, [Violent Saviors: The West's Conquest of the Rest](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=bb82972419dc9c8fa3ce767d0667787580005c5a491890a9ffe7dac5fbe72dc9&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=402dc7b338bea37b7571561db5e77e3c&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzExL3Zpb2xlbnQtc2F2aW9ycy5odG1s&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
Nicholas Walton, [Orange Sky, Rising Water: The Remarkable Past and Uncertain Future of the Netherlands](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=c9d0e79fe95ea487cd47cd75ea69738eb94cd31d5250a34b652064373cb2f0e6&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=fbe274a75396f8515e61ab975e898200&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
What else? I will give you an update on anything notable I encounter between now and the end of the year. And here is [my earlier post on the best fiction of the year](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=3f8a8c492a26b849799cc77390a3cb11c811d92dab83449bf5d821bc0bcd6f22&blog_id=42693868&post_id=89884&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=e4b278a527379219558d54158818c821&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9tYXJnaW5hbHJldm9sdXRpb24uY29tL21hcmdpbmFscmV2b2x1dGlvbi8yMDI1LzExL2Jlc3QtZmljdGlvbi1vZi0yMDI1Lmh0bWw&email_id=8f3ea7ade4428f2e20582a89caea49b6).
